items_all_raw.summary: A ceremony has been held to mark the installation of the reactor pressure vessel in the second unit at Egypt's El Dabaa Nuclear Power Plant.

items_all_raw.title: Argentina Plans 300 MW SMR at Atucha
items_all_raw.summary: Argentina Plans 300 MW SMR at Atucha (NucNet contributed to this report)  US-based energy firm Meitner Energy has presented plans to the Argentine government to build a 300 MW small modular reactor (SMR) at the Atucha nuclear power station site … Continue reading →
